news.t: Invesco Announces Changes to Four ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PBP is an equity ETF with a total of 508 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.93%, Apple at 6.91%, Microsoft at 4.60%, Amazon.com at 3.78%, and Alphabet at 3.44%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 BuyWrite ETF (PBP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe S&P 500 BuyWrite index. The fund tracks an index that uses a covered-call strategy to provide long exposure to the S&P 500 and selling call options thereon. PBP was launched on Dec 20, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco Announces Changes to Four ETFs
data.text: PBP, CQQQ and RYJ to reduce fees; fee waiver extended for ICLO ATLANTA , Jan. 4, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, has announced that it will imple...
